zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏弱上行
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元维持窄幅震荡，价格围绕1574附近运行，多空力量均衡，短线缺乏明确方向，整体仍以整理结构为主，市场情绪偏观望。

技术指标方面，MACD维持正值但动能有限，SMA20与现价基本重合，说明趋势缺乏突破性动能，短期仍以震荡修复为主，结构偏弱但有支撑。

下方支撑关注1570及1550区域，上方阻力位1582与1595，若有效突破1582或将打开短线反弹空间，操作建议低吸高抛控制仓位。

短线交易以区间策略为主，避免追涨杀跌，若跌破1570需警惕进一步回调风险，稳健者等待趋势确认后再介入，保持纪律执行仓位管理。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation phase following a marginal 24-hour decline of 0.38%, with price action compressing tightly between 1570 and 1582. The structure suggests indecision, as neither buyers nor sellers have gained clear control. Price remains near the 20-day SMA at 1574.52, indicating equilibrium. Overall momentum appears neutral, with short-term direction likely to be determined by a breakout from this narrow range.

MACD and moving average positioning suggest a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias despite limited follow-through. The MACD reading at 0.4439 indicates positive momentum, but the absence of a signal line prevents confirmation of trend strength. Price hovering around SMA(20) reflects equilibrium conditions, while volatility compression hints that momentum may soon expand in either direction once volume increases. This setup often precedes a directional breakout after prolonged compression.

Immediate support is defined near 1570, aligning with the session low, while stronger support sits slightly below around 1560. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 1582, followed by a secondary barrier near 1590 and psychological resistance at 1600. The tight range between support and resistance reinforces a consolidation phase awaiting expansion. Breakout direction will likely dictate the next short-term trend.

In current conditions, range trading strategies may be more effective, with entries favoring buys near 1570 support and profit-taking into 1582 resistance. Risk management remains critical, with stop-loss placement below 1568 to protect against downside breaks. Alternatively, a breakout strategy above 1582 could target 1590–1600, while a breakdown would expose lower liquidity zones around 1560. Confirmation on volume is essential before committing to directional trades.
